name: call-codex
description: CALL-CODEX opens macOS-first, app-server-powered calls between Codex threads.

interface.longDescription: CALL-CODEX is a macOS-first Codex plugin for super-user multi-thread missions. A main thread can boot a managed loopback app-server, create worktree-isolated worker threads, assign first-class roles, send call-line messages, stream worker progress, cleanly remove threads, and preserve local SQLite receipts.
defaultPrompt: Call Codex with builder and reviewer workers.
Open a worktree call for this repo.
Show call status and worker progress.
